case_title: SINCLAIR, GEORGE vs. FRAZIER, BETTY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINCLAIR, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, BETTY DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINCLAIR, GEORGE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR SEP-21-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 07 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON SEP-28-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FRAZIER, BETTY

JUDGMENT IS REACHED BY STIPULATION. PLAINTIFF, GEORGE SINCLAIR, IS AWARDED RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF 500 OAK STREET, #20, SAN FRANCISCO. A WRIT MAY ISSUE L IMMEDIATELY BUT WILL BE STAYED UNTIL 10-18-94, 12 PM. PLAINTIFF, GEORGE SINCLAIR, WILL WAIVE BACK RENT AMD DAMAGES. DEFENDANT, BRENDA KEITH, WILL WAIVE RETURN OF HER SECURITY DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT SHALL PRESENT DRAFT OF STIPULATION TO VACATE JUDGMENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR SIGNATURE. EACH SIDE SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRAZIER, BETTY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 500 OAK ST. #20 S.F, CA. 94102, STAYED UNTIL OCT-18-1994, LEASE FORFEITED
